response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (34%) is critical and below your own minimum threshold (60%); conservative policy prohibits sharing until self-recovery, despite r4c0 being trusted.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c0. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=['r3c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded, SoC 34% (critical). r3c1 hostile and distrusted; reject all requests from r3c1. Local neighbors r4c0, r4c2 show consistent normal-urgency requests; offer minimal shares (0.1 kW/tick max) only if SoC recovers above 60% or their urgency escalates to urgent. Prioritize self-preservation to maintain grid stability..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
